---
title: "CV"
---

## Research profile

I am a data-intensive empirical researcher trained in economic geography and regional innovation, with interests in high-skilled mobility, urban and regional development, and innovation networks. My work emphasizes longitudinal multi-source data construction, spatial and network analysis, applied empirical design, and measurement-validity audits.

## Education

**East China Normal University** — M.Sc. in Human Geography, 2023-2026  
School of Geographic Sciences; economic geography and regional innovation. Thesis: *Intercity Mobility Network of Top Global Biomedical Scientists: A Dual Perspective of Whole and Ego Networks*.

**Northeast Normal University** — B.Sc. in Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, 2019-2023  
Training in quantitative geography, GIS applications, urban geography, regional analysis, and planning.

## Research interests

Urban and regional economics; labor and high-skilled mobility; regional innovation; science of science; spatial and network data; applied empirical research.

## Publications and research outputs

- **Spatial Structure and Determinants of Top Global Biomedical Scientists' Mobility from an Urban Network Perspective** — accepted article. Final publication metadata will be added after confirmation.
- **Intercity Mobility Network of Top Global Biomedical Scientists: A Dual Perspective of Whole and Ego Networks** — master's thesis.
- **Author-Institution Linkage and Geocoding Feasibility Audit** — public code repository.

## Selected research experience

- Pre-move publication-location exposure and destination choice among elite biomedical scientists.
- Global mobility and collaboration networks of elite biomedical scientists.
- Author-institution linkage and geocoding feasibility audit.
- Technological and brand innovation among leading global R&D firms.
- Urban resilience from daily nighttime lights.

## Methods and technical skills

Python; R; Stata; GIS; social network analysis; ego-network analysis; conditional logit; ERGM/WERGM; entity resolution; longitudinal multi-source data construction; measurement-validity and coverage audits.

## Honors

Outstanding Student Award, ECNU; Academic Scholarship, ECNU; Third-Class Scholarship, NENU; Innovation and Entrepreneurship Scholarship, NENU; National Undergraduate Innovation Training Program: Excellent Completion / First Place, Project Lead.

## CV PDF

[Download my CV](assets/cv/Ran_Wang_CV_Public.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
